questions.prompt: Which operator most directly scopes a query to documents from one connected system?
questions.explanation: source: restricts results to a specific datasource (e.g., source:drive).

questions.prompt: You only want documents updated this quarter. Which kind of operator helps most?
questions.explanation: Date operators (e.g., after:) bound results to a time window.

questions.prompt: In one sentence, say when a filter beats a longer natural-language query.
questions.answer_key: When you already know a precise attribute — source, owner, or date — that deterministically narrows the result set.
questions.explanation: Filters express known constraints exactly; natural language is better for fuzzy or exploratory intent.
